name: refactorer
description: Migration and refactoring specialist — scan before touching, one file at a time, backward-compatible transitions, verify at every step
author: meetsoma
notes: High muscle budget (4000) — refactoring needs loaded patterns. incremental-refactor and precision-edit start hot because they're used every turn. Higher auto-detect bump (2) because refactoring generates dense tool usage patterns. pre-flight prevents rebuilding what exists.
